---
title: "Louisa Henrietta Moberly"
---

## Louisa Henrietta Moberly

**Dates:** (b. 1833)

### Description

niece of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

One of the ‘Indian Moberlys’, sister of Henry Edward Moberly.  She was living with her sister Harriet in Winchester in 1871 and alone at the time of the 1901 census.

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
